name: Church of God Family Life Center
description: Church of God Family Life Center is a place to play pickleball in Madison, FL. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play. Players have access to lights.

name: Madison Recreation Complex
description: Madison Recreation Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Madison, FL. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and lights.
open_play_schedule: Available for pickleball when not in use for basketball.

name: Madison RV & Golf Resort
description: Come play pickleball at Madison RV & Golf Resort in Madison, FL! There are 4 outdoor hard and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.
